data: {"generalSituation":"An easterly airstream will affect the coast of Guangdong today and tomorrow. It will be mainly cloudy with a few showers over the region. Meanwhile, an area of low pressure will bring unsettled weather to the northern part of the South China Sea. Under the influence of an active southwest monsoon and upper-air disturbances, there will be occasional heavy showers and squally thunderstorms over southern China during the weekend to midweek next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260611","week":"Thursday","forecastWind":"East to northeast force 4, occasionally force 5 offshore.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with one or two showers.
